query:
-- Create a test driver user
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES (
  CONCAT('driver_test_', UUID()),
  'Carlos Mendoza',
  'carlos.driver@example.com',
  'test',
  'driver',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Verify the user was created
SELECT id, email, name, role FROM users WHERE email = 'carlos.driver@example.com';
